name: io.github.chdb-io/chdb-mcp
description: In-process OLAP for AI agents — query Parquet, CSV, JSON, pandas DataFrames, and remote ClickHouse with one tool. Powered by chDB.

environment_variables.name: CHDB_MCP_WRITE
environment_variables.description: Set to 1 to allow INSERT/CREATE/DROP/ALTER (default: read-only).

environment_variables.name: CHDB_MCP_MAX_RESULT_BYTES
environment_variables.description: Per-tool result truncation threshold in bytes (default: 1048576).

environment_variables.name: CHDB_MCP_FILE_ALLOWLIST
environment_variables.description: Colon-separated path prefixes from which query_file() may read.

environment_variables.name: CHDB_MCP_SESSION_PATH
environment_variables.description: Directory for a persistent chDB session; if unset, session is in-memory.
